---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Me"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
library(DiagrammeR)
mermaid("
graph TD
    A[Start: update agent]
    B[Append current disease state to history]
    C[Increment age by one]
    D{Age less or equal to ageCap and not vaccinated?}
    E[Perform random vaccination with 30 percent chance]
    F[Do not vaccinate]
    G{HPV status equals none?}
    H[Set p infection: if age less than 26 then 0.05 else 0.02]
    I{Agent is vaccinated?}
    J[Multiply p infection by 0.1]
    K[Keep p infection unchanged]
    L{Random value less than p infection?}
    M[Set HPV status to low risk with 80 percent chance or high risk with 20 percent chance]
    N[HPV status remains none]
    O[Evaluate disease progression]
    P{HPV status equals high risk?}
    Q[If healthy and random value less than 0.2 change state to precancer]
    R[If precancer and random value less than 0.3 change state to cancer]
    S{HPV status equals low risk?}
    T[If healthy and random value less than 0.05 change state to precancer]
    U[If precancer and random value less than 0.075 change state to cancer]
    V[No change in state]
    W[Evaluate death events]
    X{If disease state equals cancer and random value less than 0.2?}
    Y[Change state to dead from cancer]
    Z{Else if random value less than 0.01?}
    AA[Change state to dead from background mortality]
    AB[Return updated agent]

    A --> B
    B --> C
    C --> D
    D -- Yes --> E
    D -- No --> F
    E --> G
    F --> G
    G -- Yes --> H
    G -- No --> O
    H --> I
    I -- Yes --> J
    I -- No --> K
    J --> L
    K --> L
    L -- Yes --> M
    L -- No --> N
    M --> O
    N --> O
    O --> P
    P -- Yes --> Q
    Q --> R
    R --> W
    P -- No --> S
    S -- Yes --> T
    T --> U
    U --> W
    S -- No --> V
    Q -- Not triggered --> V
    R -- Not triggered --> V
    T -- Not triggered --> V
    U -- Not triggered --> V
    V --> W
    W --> X
    X -- Yes --> Y
    X -- No --> Z
    Z -- Yes --> AA
    Z -- No --> AB
    Y --> AB
    AA --> AB
")
```
